ops.title: Adoption decision: cc-steer's experimentation layer = athome (ai-trains-ai learnings)
ops.body: Decision (2026-07-16, user-approved plan `plans/lets-see-what-we-synchronous-cookie.md`): cc-steer does NOT build native experiment/budget/backlog machinery — it adopts `experiment-at-home` (athome). Key calls: **D1** the P5 sweep's metric_command wraps a new score-only cc-steer lane (sentinel-logprob AUC → `athome.train.write_metric`), not `athome train run` (bakeoff metric = wrong instrument). **D2** domain machinery stays native (evalset/promotion/data/scorers/drafter_mlx/lexical); true duplicates deleted for athome imports (convert_peft_to_mlx, download_adapter, BASE_MODELS/pricing, tinker credentials → ~/.athome/tinker.env); keep `train_lora` (best-of-4-checkpoints selection has no athome equivalent); do NOT adopt `athome train run()` end-to-end; do NOT swap cc_steer/registry.py yet (async, lacks prune/rollback). **D3** local parquet stays canonical; fix = provenance ({dataset_digest, hf_revision}). **D4** mirror promotion.journal() to cc-notes; never reroute retrain rows through athome's Journal (wrong shape). **D5** judged gate via athome Judge/GoldenGate on disagreement fires + helpful-coverage; golden packet on the clean (post-T1) frame, persisted at ~/.cc-steer/eval/golden/watcher-fires/ (personal data, out of repo). Budgets nest without touching: recipe $15 ⊂ experiment max_usd $50; athome TinkerSettings cap only if its backend is adopted. Learnings adopted from github.com/Danau5tin/ai-trains-ai are tabulated in the plan; athome grows the autonomous-under-caps outer loop (A1–A8) it needs first.
